privileged_info_summary: Task add_hilt_dependency_injection@1 is a synthetic Android development task for integrating Hilt dependency injection into a BookTrackerApp project. The project is created synthetically at /home/ga/AndroidStudioProjects/BookTrackerApp with package structure com.example.booktracker. The task requires adding Hilt 2.50 dependency injection framework to the Android Gradle build system, creating a BookTrackerApplication class annotated with @HiltAndroidApp, and refactoring MainActivity and BookRepository to use Hilt injection. All claimed metadata values (project path, package name, Hilt version 2.50, expected application class name, and synthetic data source) are verified as correct.
